positive: A mystical, detailed depiction of a soaring griffin perched on a dramatic cliff edge at sunset. The griffin has iridescent feather details and sharp, powerful silhouette against a vibrant sky. The composition must be centered, emphasizing the strong outline of the creature and the dramatic sky. Style: High contrast graphic novel illustration meets Art Nouveau elegance. Color palette: Deep magentas, burnt oranges, celestial blues, and striking golds. The background elements should be stylized and simplified to maintain focus on the griffin's silhouette for apparel printing. Perfect for repeating seamless print or a central chest graphic. Highly detailed, vector art qualities, clean linework, golden ratio composition.
